mapper.sql:
select acr.question_text , acr.answer_text , ui.password , acr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , acr.create_time , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , acr.audio_url , ui.phone_number , acr.ai_chat_record_id , ui.username
FROM ai_chat_record acr left join user_info ui on acr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select acr.question_text , acr.answer_text , ui.password , acr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , acr.create_time , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , acr.audio_url , ui.phone_number , acr.ai_chat_record_id , ui.username
FROM ai_chat_record acr left join
user_info
ui on acr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
